zh.lifeSummary: 當Erik Knutsson於大約1180年出生在瑞典時，他的父親Knut Eriksson40歲，母親Cecilia Johansdotter37歲。他和Richeza of Denmark至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1216年4月10日在瑞典越可平維辛索亞斯享年37歲，埋葬在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德瓦恩姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Erik Knutsson于大约1180年出生在瑞典时，他的父亲Knut Eriksson40岁，母亲Cecilia Johansdotter37岁。他和Richeza of Denmark至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1216年4月10日在瑞典越可平維辛索亞斯享年37岁，埋葬在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德瓦恩姆。

nameMeanings.name: Knutsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Knutson  , a surname of Swedish or Norwegian origin.

variants.name: Knutson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knute, Selmer, Ingard, Jarl, Jorgen, Juel, Nels, Obert, Tryg, Algot, Egil.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Knutsson: patronymic from the personal name Knut (see Knudsen ).
Americanized form of Norwegian   Knutsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Erik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Later variant of   Eirik  , now in frequent use, especially in Sweden.

variants.name: Eric
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

variants.name: Eirik
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Eirikr, a compound of ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’.

en.lifeSummary: When Erik Knutsson was born about 1180, in Sweden, his father, Knut Eriksson, was 40 and his mother, Cecilia Johansdotter, was 37. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Richeza of Denmark. He died on 10 April 1216, in Näs, Visingsö, Jönköping, Sweden, at the age of 37, and was buried in Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Erik Knutsson est né environ 1180, à Suède, son père, Knut Eriksson, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Johansdotter, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Richeza of Denmark. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1216, à Näs, Visingsö, Jönköping, Suède, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Als Erik Knutsson um 1180 in Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Knut Eriksson 40 und seine Mutter Cecilia Johansdotter 37. Er hatte mit Richeza of Denmark mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. April 1216 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Näs, Visingsö, Jönköping, Schweden und wurde in Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Erik Knutsson è nato il circa 1180 nel Svezia, il suo padre, Knut Eriksson, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Johansdotter, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Richeza of Denmark. Morì il 10 aprile 1216, nel Näs, Visingsö, Jönköping, Svezia, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Erik Knutssonが約1180年にスウェーデンで生まれた時，父Knut Erikssonは40歳，母Cecilia Johansdotterは37歳であった。彼はRicheza of Denmarkとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1216年4月10日にスウェーデンジoンクoパングヴィシングスoンaスで37歳で死去し，スウェーデンvaストラ グoタランドバーンヘムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Erik Knutsson(이)가 대략 1180년 스웨덴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Knut Eriksson(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Johansdotter(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Richeza of Denmark(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1216년 4월 10일 스웨덴 joko핀그 비징스o a스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 브a스트라 그o탤란드 바른헤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Erik Knutsson nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Suécia, seu pai, Knut Eriksson, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Johansdotter, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Richeza of Denmark. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1216, em Näs, Visingsö, Jönköping, Suécia, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Erik Knutsson родился около 1180 г. в местности Швеция, его отцу по имени Knut Eriksson было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Johansdotter, 37. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Richeza of Denmark. Он умер 10 апреля 1216 г. в местности нaс, висингсo, джoнкoпинг, Швеция в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности варнем, вaстра гoталанд, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Erik Knutsson nació aproximadamente 1180, en Suecia, su papá, Knut Eriksson, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Cecilia Johansdotter, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Richeza of Denmark. Murió el 10 de abril de 1216, en Näs, Visingsö, Jönköping, Suecia, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Suecia.
